task: Docs-only design spec for Finance Hub FH-4 (Finance Calculator). PURE CALCULATION, no posting, no GL, no money path. Model-before-commit: enter price/down/rate/term -> monthly payment, total interest, payoff date, amortization preview (same shared fixed-payment math as FH-3, so calculator and real schedule never disagree). Scenario modeling (compare two+ rate/term options with deltas). Hand-off button pre-fills the FH-2 Loan Wizard ('use these numbers to create the loan') -- the calculator itself creates nothing. Open questions (persist named scenarios?, lease-vs-buy?, APR?), low-risk build sequence. NO code. Part of the gated Finance Hub; GUARD reviews the math against the FH-3 engine.
